channel.display-name: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
The Trial Of The Incredible Hulk
Arthur and the Haunted Tree House
Second Stories - It Had to Be Done
Rockfield: the Studio on the Farm
Monty Python and the Holy Grail
In Viaggio: The Travels of Pope Francis
Celebrating Carol Burnett: The Gift Of Laughter
Monty Python Live (Mostly): One Down, Five To Go
Bruce Lee: The Way of the Warrior
True North: Inside the Rise of Toronto Basketball (Feature)
Making Coco: The Grant Fuhr Story
100 Things to do Before High School
Cristiano Ronaldo - The One and Only

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: The Big Apple’s in big trouble, as indestructible psycho-fiend Jason Voorhees hits the road to New York City - and paints the town “red.”

programme.title: The Trial Of The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: In this action adventure based on the 1980s series, Dr. David Banner and his ferocious alter ego, the Hulk, team up with a blind attorney named Murdock. Starring Bill Bixby and Lou Ferrigno.

programme.title: Scream 4
programme.desc: Neve Campbell, Courtney Cox, and David Arquette resurrect their famous roles in this spine-chilling sequel. Ghostface returns to Woodsboro – but it’s a new decade, with new rules.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Two years after the first series of murders, as Sidney acclimates to college life, someone donning the Ghostface costume begins a new string of killings.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: The first film set the rules. In the sequel, the stakes got higher. In the third installment of the hit franchise SCREAM, all bets are off. It's an insidious game of horror movie mayhem with surprising twists and turns.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: An aging woman questions her life after suspecting her husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Apocalypse Now Redux
programme.desc: Francis Ford Coppola's groundbreaking classic - with 49 minutes of additional footage in the APOCALYPSE NOW REDUX edition!

programme.title: Taylor
programme.desc: A sweeping, emotional look at Taylor Swift's evolution from gifted young songwriter to global icon, told through rare footage and insight from key cultural voices and devoted fans.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly… then part without expectation when she decides they must let fate determine if they should be together.

programme.title: Nickelodeon’s Not So Valentine’s Special
programme.desc: The Nickelodeon stars are invited to Cupid headquarters and uncover an evil plan to destroy Valentine’s Day. Now it is up to our stars to restore love and friendship throughout the world.

programme.title: Call Me By Your Name
programme.desc: Elio, a budding teenager, is spending an idyllic summer in Italy with his parents when a handsome research assistant, Oliver, comes to stay with them.

programme.title: Penelope
programme.desc: She's young, she's rich, she's available - too bad she has a pig's nose. Christina Ricci and James McAvoy team in a modern fairy tale about finding perfect love, imperfections and all.

programme.title: Game 6
programme.desc: Combining real and fictional events, this movie centers around the historic 1986 World Series, and a day in the life of a playwright who skips opening night to watch the momentous game.

programme.title: Taylor Swift: Melodies and Hearts
programme.desc: A look at the rise of Taylor Swift and her sensational relationship with Travis Kelce.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: One black and one white woman in 1955 Montgomery, Alabama must decide what they are going to do in response to the famous bus boycott lead by Martin Luther King. With Whoopi Goldberg and Sissy Spacek.

programme.title: Festival Express
programme.desc: In the summer of 1970, several of the era's biggest rock stars took to the rails for Festival Express. The show was a multi-artist, multi-city concert tour that captured the spirit and imagination of a generation.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor (Michael Douglas) enlists the help of his neighbor (Diane Keaton) when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train
programme.desc: In this black-Comedy spin-off of Alfred Hitchcock's STRANGERS ON A TRAIN, a writing student tries to persuade his instructor to trade murders.

programme.title: The Oath
programme.desc: A controversial White House policy turns family member against family member when Chris, a high-strung progressive news junkie, and his more levelheaded wife Kai learn that citizens are being asked to sign a loyalty oath to the President.

programme.title: The View From The Top
programme.desc: Donna, a small town Nevada woman who dreams of seeing the world by becoming a first class international stewardess.

programme.title: Moonrise Kingdom
programme.desc: A pair of young lovers flee their New England town, which causes a local search party to fan out to find them.

programme.title: Arthur and the Haunted Tree House
programme.desc: While trick-or-treating, Francine meets an old woman with a very mysterious past, while Binky finds himself at Mr. Ratburn’s amazing haunted house! Then, can Arthur, Buster, and Ladonna figure out what’s haunting their tree house sleepover?

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: Roman Polanski directs and Johnny Depp stars in this supernatural thriller about a rare-book dealer who discovers a demonic manuscript.

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: When long-time married couple Ruth (Diane Keaton) and Alex (Morgan Freeman) decide to move away from New York City, they must contend with eccentric open house guests, their pushy realtor niece, and the health of their beloved family dog.

programme.title: Second Stories - It Had to Be Done
programme.desc: It Had To Be Done explores the legacy of residential schools through the eyes of two extraordinary women who not only lived it firsthand, but who, as adults, made the surprising choice to return to the school that had affected their lives so profoundly.

programme.title: Three Thousand
programme.desc: Inuk artist Asinnajaq plunges us into a sublime imaginary universe—14 minutes of luminescent, archive-inspired cinema that recast the past, present and future of Inuit in a radiant new light.

programme.title: The Ballad of Crowfoot
programme.desc: Often referred to as Canada’s first music video, The Ballad of Crowfoot was directed by Willie Dunn, a Mi’kmaq/Scottish folk singer and activist who was part of the historic Indian Film Crew, the first all-Indigenous production unit at the NFB.

programme.title: Honour to Senator Murray Sinclair
programme.desc: Alanis Obomsawin shares the powerful speech the Senator gave when he accepted the WFM-Canada World Peace Award, interspersing the heartbreaking testimonies of former students imprisoned at residential schools.

programme.title: You Are on Indian Land
programme.desc: Released in 1969, this short documentary was one of the most influential and widely distributed productions made by the Indian Film Crew (IFC), the first all-Indigenous unit at the NFB. It documents a 1969 protest by the Kanien'kéhaka of Akwesasne.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship and prevent a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Chaos On The Bridge
programme.desc: Acting legend William Shatner takes viewers inside the creation of Star Trek: The Next Generation, the bold attempt in 1986 to recreate the success of the original television series, in which Shatner played Captain James T. Kirk.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life and music of Manchester-based rock band, Oasis.

programme.title: Rockfield: the Studio on the Farm
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the legendary Rockfield Studios with appearances from those who have recorded within its hallowed walls.

programme.title: Apollo 11
programme.desc: Apollo 11 is a cinematic space event film fifty years in the making. Featuring never-before-seen large-format film footage of one of humanity's greatest accomplishments to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

programme.title: The Wonder of it All
programme.desc: The Wonder of it All focuses on the rarely told human side of the men behind the Apollo missions through thoughtful and candid accounts from seven Moonwalkers. We honor the men who walked on the moon and became heroes to a nation.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: In this twisting cop thriller, an alcoholic detective (Sylvester Stallone) is sent to a remote detox clinic after a serial killer targets his friends and family.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Almost four decades after he drew first blood, Sylvester Stallone is back as John Rambo to exact the ultimate revenge in his final mission.

programme.title: Backtrace
programme.desc: The lone surviving thief of a violent armored car robbery is sprung from a high security facility and administered an experimental drug.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: The tender, heartbreaking story of a young man’s struggle to find himself, told across three defining chapters in his life as he experiences the ecstasy, pain and beauty of falling in love, while grappling with his own sexuality.

programme.title: Cutting Class
programme.desc: Troubled Brian Woods, back from a mental institution and dealing with his father's death, competes for Paula's love against rebel Dwight. As students vanish, suspicion falls on Brian, but the threat lurks elsewhere. Starring Brad Pitt.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island. Starring Jeff Daniels, Ryan Reynolds, Emma Stone, Kieran Culkin, and Lisa Kudrow.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Now Is the Time
programme.desc: On the 50th anniversary of the first new totem pole raising on British Columbia’s Haida Gwaii in almost a century, Haida filmmaker Christopher Auchter steps through history to revisit the day that would signal the rebirth of the Haida spirit.

programme.title: I Am Not Your Negro
programme.desc: Raoul Peck’s Oscar-nominated I Am Not Your Negro explores the history of racism in the United States through James Baldwin's recollections of civil rights leaders Medgar Evers, Malcolm X and Martin Luther King Jr. Narrated by actor Samuel L. Jackson.

programme.title: In Viaggio: The Travels of Pope Francis
programme.desc: During the first nine years of his papacy, Pope Francis visits 53 countries to focus on important issues: poverty, migration, the environment, solidarity and war.

programme.title: Celebrating Carol Burnett: The Gift Of Laughter
programme.desc: Join Carol Burnett as she shares her favorite moments of her storied career and incredible life - spanning 90 years of love and laughter.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: A spoof movie that references The Hunger Games, The Avengers, Sherlock Holmes, and the Harry Potter saga.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: In this triple Oscar-winning film, a young drummer (Miles Teller) in his school's top-tier jazz band clashes with the intense, abusive methods of an obsessive music teacher (J.K. Simmons). With Melissa Benoist.

programme.title: Monty Python Live (Mostly): One Down, Five To Go
programme.desc: Filmed on the final night of the run of ten sold out performances, live at London's O2 Arena, Monty Python Live (mostly) – One Down Five to Go sees the five surviving members together performing many of their classic sketches and much-loved songs.

programme.title: Little Monsters
programme.desc: A washed-up musician teams up with a teacher and a kids show personality to protect young children from a sudden outbreak of zombies.

programme.title: Anthropocene: The Human Epoch
programme.desc: In their arresting and immersive film, award-winning filmmakers Jennifer Baichwal and Nicholas de Pencier, and renowned photographer Edward Burtynsky travel the globe to document the impact humans have made on our planet.

programme.title: If You Love This Planet
programme.desc: This film records a lecture given to students by outspoken nuclear critic, Dr. Helen Caldicott, president of Physicians for Social Responsibility in the United States. Her message is clear: disarmament cannot be postponed.

programme.title: Mother Earth/La Terre Notre Mere
programme.desc: Mother Earth is a short, evocative, poetic film that celebrates life on our planet. This documentary film looks at the reality of human beings; the earth is our home and we are profoundly connected to all other beings.

programme.title: 500 days in the Wild
programme.desc: After a 6-year journey, filmmaker Dianne Whelan became the first person to travel the 24,000 km of the Trans Canada Trail—the longest trail in the world. 500 Days in the Wild weaves adventure, personal reflections, stunning wildlife and landscapes.

programme.title: Atonement
programme.desc: This film shows efforts being made by wildlife specialists to preserve and nurture the creatures that do remain in our wilderness areas. Scenes rarely photographed make this a spellbinding film throughout.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: A lonely boy’s life is transformed when he befriends a “wonder” dog who teaches him to play basketball.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Maudie follows the unlikely romance between Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis (Sally Hawkins) and reclusive fishmonger Everett Lewis (Ethan Hawke).

programme.title: Entanglement
programme.desc: While searching for the meaning of his existence, Ben uncovers a secret that leads him to a woman named Hanna. When Ben falls for Hanna his life becomes increasingly and strangely complicated.

programme.title: Grizzlies, The
programme.desc: In this inspiring true story, a group of Inuit students in a small, struggling Arctic community are changed forever through the transformative power of sport.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young man convinces his girlfriend to accompany him to a summer festival in Sweden that turns out to be not what it seems.

programme.title: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: Three best friends find themselves where we've all been - at that confusing moment in every dating relationship when you have to decide "So...where is this going?"

programme.title: The English Patient
programme.desc: Winner of 9 Academy Awards including Best Picture in 1997. At the close of World War II, a young nurse tends to a badly-burned plane crash victim. His past is shown in flashbacks, revealing an involvement in a fateful love affair.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: Nominated for 8 Academy Awards®. An unexpected bond forms between a formerly institutionalized man (Bradley Cooper) and a woman recovering from her own tragedy (Jennifer Lawrence).

programme.title: Austenland
programme.desc: A woman who is obsessed with "Pride and Prejudice" travels to a Jane Austen theme park in search for her perfect gentleman. Starring Keri Russell, Jennifer Coolidge and JJ Feild.

programme.title: Unarmed Verses
programme.desc: This feature documentary presents a thoughtful and vivid portrait of a community facing imposed relocation. Unarmed Verses is a cinematic rendering of our universal need for self-expression and belonging.

programme.title: Kobe Bryant - A Tribute
programme.desc: Kobe's dedication to his career, family and charity work led to him being adored the world over.

programme.title: Blue Valentine
programme.desc: Oscar®-nominees Ryan Gosling (THE NOTEBOOK) and Michelle Williams (BROKEBACK MOUNTAIN) star in BLUE VALENTINE, a story of love found and love lost told in moments past and present.

programme.title: Sleeping With Other People
programme.desc: A good-natured womanizer and a serial cheater form a platonic relationship that helps reform them in ways, while a mutual attraction sets in.

programme.title: Someone Like Me
programme.desc: When a queer group of strangers unite to support a gay Ugandan man seeking asylum in Canada, unexpected challenges lead them down an emotional road together in search of personal freedom.

programme.title: The farewell
programme.desc: A Chinese family discovers their grandmother has only a short while left to live and decide to keep her in the dark, scheduling a wedding to gather before she dies.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: The Way of the Warrior
programme.desc: Bruce Lee, an iconic figure in Hollywood cinema, a pioneer of martial arts but most importantly, a friend.

programme.title: The Captains
programme.desc: The original Captain Kirk, William Shatner, travels around the globe to interview the elite group of actors (Patrick Stewart, Chris Pine, Scott Bakula, Avery Brooks and more) who have portrayed the role of Enterprise Captain.

programme.title: Trekkies
programme.desc: Denise Crosby takes a first look at the huge fans of 'Star Trek' and how the series from around America has affected and shaped their lives.

programme.title: The Final Year
programme.desc: A chronicle of the Obama administration's foreign policy team and the events of Obama's final year in office.

programme.title: I Am MLK Jr.
programme.desc: I Am MLK Jr. celebrates the life and explores the character of American icon, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

programme.title: Elvis: The Golden Greats
programme.desc: The King performs some of his greatest hits.

programme.title: WILLY'S WONDERLAND
programme.desc: A quiet drifter is tricked into a janitorial job at the now condemned Willy's Wonderland. The mundane tasks become a fight for survival against demonic animatronics.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: After middle-aged filmmaker Josh and his wife Cornelia meet a free- spirited twenty-something couple, they adopt a new lifestyle. But with each hilarious attempt to act young, Josh and Cornelia start to appreciate the rewards of growing old together.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: Once told they'd save the universe during a time-traveling adventure, two would-be rockers from San Dimas, California find themselves as middle-aged dads still trying to crank out a hit song and fulfill their destiny.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: Workaholics Jack and Mindy are too busy to get into the holiday spirit. As their Christmas deadlines fast approach, holiday spirit is at an all time low. The Fletchers need help and there is only one solution, hire a Christmas consultant.

programme.title: Fatman
programme.desc: Santa's workshop is in financial peril and to make matters worse, a disgruntled boy puts a sizable hit on the fatman's (Mel Gibson) head after receiving a lump of coal for Christmas.

programme.title: Wild Mountain Thyme
programme.desc: A pair of star-crossed lovers in Ireland get caught up in their family's land dispute.

programme.title: The Raven
programme.desc: While investigating a double murder, police detective Emmett Fields discovers that the crime scene mirrors the setting depicted in one of Edgar Allan Poe's works of fiction. Suspecting Poe, Fields ultimately enlists his help to catch the killer.

programme.title: True North: Inside the Rise of Toronto Basketball (Feature)
programme.desc: In this feature-length doc, director Ryan Sidhoo shines the spotlight on 12-year-old Elijah Fisher, 15-year-old Keone Davis and 18-year-old Cordell Veira as they navigate today’s youth basketball machine in pursuit of their own NBA dreams.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Finding Big Country
programme.desc: Two decades since the Vancouver Grizzlies left town with player Big Country Bryant Reeves taking most of the blame, but superfan Kat isn‚Äôt over it. She goes on a mission to find her childhood hero.

programme.title: The Russian Five
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, the Detroit Red Wings worked to finally break their decades long Stanley Cup drought by extracting players from the Soviet Union and changed the way North American hockey is played.

programme.title: Dinner With Friends
programme.desc: Molly (Malin Akerman) and Abby (Kat Dennings), along with their crew of close friends and acquaintances, host a dysfunctional, comical and chaotic dinner.

programme.title: Making Coco: The Grant Fuhr Story
programme.desc: Fuhr and former teammates provide a never-before-seen look into his NHL Hall of Fame career through his years on the Edmonton Oilers, St. Louis Blues, Toronto Maple Leafs and other pro and jr. teams.

programme.title: The Sweater
programme.desc: Roch Carrier narrates a childhood mishap in "The Hockey Sweater." In rural Quebec, boys idolize Maurice "Rocket" Richard. When the protagonist receives a Toronto Maple Leafs jersey instead of a Canadiens one, embarrassment ensues at the local rink.

programme.title: The Ron Clark Story
programme.desc: A small-town teacher relocates to one of the toughest classrooms in the country.

programme.title: Evan's Drum
programme.desc: After generations of silence, the rhythm of the Inuit drum has returned to Labrador. Evan’s Drum is a joyful, intimate window into the lives of an Inuit family who work alongside their community to keep this drumbeat alive.

programme.title: Indigenous Plant Diva
programme.desc: Cease Wyss was given the name 'T'Uy'Tanat', meaning "Woman who travels by canoe to gather medicines for all people." Wyss reveals the remarkable healing powers of plants growing among the sprawling urban streets of downtown Vancouver.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Live Rarities
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses live on stage.

programme.title: After Everything
programme.desc: Starring Jeremy Allen White and Maika Monroe. A young couple's relationship develops quickly when one of them is diagnosed with a life-changing illness.

programme.title: 100 Things to do Before High School
programme.desc: With the pressures of high school in their near future, CJ and her two best friends decide to embark on a series of middle school adventures while they can still take risks and have fun.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo - The One and Only
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo isn't just a great footballer- he's an icon and role model for millions around the world.

programme.title: Meet The Beatles
programme.desc: Featuring rare archive performances by the Beatles performing live in the USA; this is the powerful review of the album which launched the Beatles in America.
